title: Optermus
description: A modpack that focuses on playing the Create Mod and Mekanism together and is also a lot of fun with many other mods.
body:
# General
### What is Optermus ?
- Experience a world full of great mods such as the Create Mod or Mekanism. 
Invite your friends and fight against the new Enderdragon or discover the new structures, caves or biomes. 
Make new food or decorate your houses. 
Tame new creatures and modify your equipment
### Why should you play Optermus ?
- This modpack is full of adventure and technology which makes it a lot of fun to play, especially with friends.

# Features

- 🗡️  Weapon Modifications -> Modify your sword and give them a new look.
- ⚙️  Create Extensions -> Discover many extensions that will make your Create Mod easier.
- 🖥️  EM System -> Store as many items as you want.
- 🐘  New Animals -> Discover new animals and tame them.
- 🗺️  Biomes and Structures -> Discover new biomes and explore new structures.
- 🦖  New Caves -> Discover new caves but watch out for creatures lurking there.
- ⚔️  A Special End Fight -> Can you defeat the end dragon?
- 🍔  Lots of new food -> Farmers Delight brings lots of new food into the game.
- 🪑   Many new decoration items -> With the decoration mods you can beautify your buildings.
- 🔊  Voice chat -> Inagmevoicechat where you can talk to your friends.
- 👥  Create a team -> [Comming soon]

# Multiplayer

### 
Optermus is designed for multiplayer. get your friends, play together or alone and start a new adventure. 


![Multiplayer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/407ed1c693840eb7e8bb656a8315f1ee12012f01.png)
